title: psoralea zeyheri
intro: Psoralea zeyheri, also known as Zeyher's Psoralea, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly found in South Africa. The medicinal properties of Psoralea zeyheri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as improving skin health, reducing inflammation, and supporting bone health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Psoralea zeyheri is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
